ValueSet-IMMZD5DTTBEContraindicationsVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD5DTTBEContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note-66
The client has moderate to severe fever-58

ValueSet-IMMZD5DTTBEContraindicationsVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD5DTTBEContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD5DTTBEContraindicationsVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
